title: mid-stream eviction safety (D12 voice_session hold) + inverse D10 wait/warm
d12_behavior_observed: HELD - in both injected runs the production retrieval search (GET /debug/context: query embed via localstack embed-qwen3-8b + rerank-qwen3-8b) fired mid-utterance was held by local_stack.voice_session()/retrieval_gate and completed AFTER the WS closed. Holds (6.24s and 3.41s) stayed under the 8.0s RETRIEVAL_GATE_TIMEOUT_S, so neither search took the degradation path: both ran the full semantic+rerank pipeline post-release (relevant_count identical to no-voice baseline). Zero "retrieval gate held ... past the gate timeout" lines in the journal. llama-swap /running sampled every 1s shows speaches resident in 100%% of streaming-window samples; the audio-group eviction by the released search happened only AFTER session close (proven by injected_late needing a fresh 4.58s warm because injected_mid's released search had evicted audio between sessions).

methodology.stream: Real /ws/stt onbox sessions (default VAD loop), live protocol stt_start/stt_audio(b64 PCM16)/stt_stop; 11.21s 24kHz reference clip /tmp/qwen_batch_test.wav streamed in 0.1s frames at real-time pacing (0.1s sleep/frame).
methodology.injection: GET :9091/debug/context?query=... fired from a background thread when the send loop crossed 50%% (injected_mid) and 75%% (injected_late) of the clip.
methodology.decision_math: PASS/FAIL from the committed harness diagnostics/localstack/stt_evict_safety.py decide() (insufficient_partials / partial_count_drop / inter_partial_stall / transcript equality vs an uninjected control run, gap tolerance 1.0s).
methodology.residency_proof: llama-swap /running sampled every 1.0s for the whole injected session (scratch ResidencyTimeline thread).
methodology.oom_watch: nvidia-smi memory.used sampled every 0.5s across the whole gate; dmesg + both service journals grepped after.
methodology.driver: scratch driver /tmp/g6_driver.py on MS02 (measurement-only; no repo changes); raw: /tmp/g6_raw.json

finals: Hello, from the on-box Quen Text2 speech engine. This is a second sentence to force chunking. And a third.
Hello, from the on-box Quen Text2 speech engine. This is a second sentence to force chunking. And a third.
Hello, from the on-box Quen Text2 speech engine. This is a second sentence to force chunking. And a third.

evidence.detail: Both injected runs: stt_done terminal, 5/5 partials retained vs control, max inter-partial gap UNCHANGED (extra_gap -0.011s / -0.015s), transcript byte-identical to control after normalization, whisper (speaches) resident in every 1s residency sample of the streaming window.

evidence.injected_mid: fired t=6.344s, WS closed 12.583s, returned 18.126s -> held 6.24s by the voice session, completed 5.54s after close; wall 11.78s vs ~4.5s no-voice steady-state baseline (G5 M2) = +7.3s hold cost
evidence.injected_late: fired t=13.154s, WS closed 16.568s, returned 22.226s -> held 3.41s, wall 9.07s
evidence.gate_timeout_path: not taken (both holds < RETRIEVAL_GATE_TIMEOUT_S=8.0s); no gate-timeout log lines; full semantic results returned (relevant_count=3, matching baseline)

evidence.dmesg: no OOM-killer events, no CUDA errors
evidence.journals: no error/oom/failed lines in blackbox.service or blackbox-models.service beyond benign speaches-boot health-probe connection-refused churn

evidence.setup: retrieval group resident (embed primed), search launched first, /ws/stt opened 1.0s into it

finals: Hello, from the on-box Quen Text2 speech engine.

evidence.detail: stt_status{loading_models} affordance emitted immediately; listening reached at 6.50s (D10 ceiling 30s); streamed 4s of the clip -> correct utterance final + stt_done; NO stt_error, NO silent failure, NO cloud fallback. The stream's audio-group warm queued behind the in-flight retrieval work exactly as designed (llama-swap drains, then swaps).
evidence.caveat: the embedder was already resident so the concurrent search finished fast (3.17s, ~2.2s after stream open) - the stream waited behind a SHORT search here; the fully-cold bound comes from G5 M3 (worst connect->listening 5.10s incl. dropped page cache, still 6x under the ceiling)

anomalies: llama-swap logs 'proxy error: dial tcp 127.0.0.1:9099: connect: connection refused' pairs during every speaches boot - the /upstream/speaches/health warm probes hitting the pinned static port before uvicorn binds. Benign (the poll loop retries at 1s and the D10 affordance covers it); no client-visible failure.

Whisper renders 'on-box Qwen text to speech' as 'on-box Quen Text2 speech' consistently in control AND injected runs - STT accuracy quirk of the reference clip, irrelevant to eviction safety (transcript equality is control-vs-injected).

Post-check STT streamed only the first 3s of the clip and transcribed the truncated audio loosely ('Hello, from the Unboxed Quintext') - truncation artifact, session mechanics (listening/final/stt_done) all clean.
